pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 1.5.4.RELEASE to 3.3.13 to align with Java 17 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 1.5 is incompatible with Java 17 and lacks support for modern features required by the target stack; compilation and runtime will fail without this upgrade.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 1.8 to 17 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The build will fail or produce incompatible bytecode if the source/target version is not updated to match the runtime JDK 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit Groovy version management to resolve dependency conflicts with Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 requires Groovy 3.x; without explicit management, transitive dependencies might pull in incompatible Groovy 2.x versions causing runtime errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update MySQL connector artifact coordinates from mysql:mysql-connector-java to com.mysql:mysql-connector-j.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact ID is deprecated and removed in newer versions; using it will result in dependency resolution failure or runtime classpath issues with Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add flyway-mysql dependency to support Flyway with MySQL in newer versions.
pom.xml.why_exists: Flyway 9+ requires explicit database-specific dependencies; without flyway-mysql, Flyway will fail to initialize the MySQL connector at runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Exclude JUnit 4 from rider-core to avoid conflicts with JUnit 5 in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 uses JUnit 5; mixing JUnit 4 and 5 can cause test runner conflicts and runtime failures during test execution.

pom.xml.general_idea: Exclude JUnit 4 from hamcrest-junit to avoid conflicts with JUnit 5.
pom.xml.why_exists: Prevents JUnit 4/5 conflicts in the test classpath, ensuring clean test execution with Spring Boot 3's JUnit 5 setup.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' errors on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 2.x logging property with Spring Boot 3.x equivalent.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x removes support for the 'logging.file' property, causing the configuration to be ignored or throwing an invalid configuration error depending on strictness settings.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 2.x management context path property with Spring Boot 3.x equivalent.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x removes support for 'management.context-path', requiring the use of 'management.server.base-path' to configure the management endpoint base path.

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.general_idea: Remove JUnit 4 runner annotation and imports in favor of JUnit 5 default execution.
src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x and JUnit 5 do not support the JUnit 4 @RunWith annotation; tests will fail to launch or compile if the runner is not removed and replaced with JUnit 5 extensions (or implicit execution).

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 import with JUnit 5 import to align with Spring Boot 3 test dependencies.
src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.why_exists: org.junit.Test class is removed in JUnit 5; using it causes a compile error (cannot find symbol).

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.general_idea: Rename deprecated Spring Data JPA method getOne to getReferenceById.
src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.why_exists: getOne() was deprecated in Spring Data JPA 2.1 and removed in later versions compatible with Spring Boot 3; calling it causes a compile error (cannot find symbol).

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents to support the new testing framework.
src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.why_exists: JUnit 4 annotations like @Before and @Test are not recognized by the JUnit 5 engine, causing tests to be skipped or fail to execute.

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents to support the new testing framework.
src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.why_exists: JUnit 4 annotations like @Before and @Test are not recognized by the JUnit 5 engine, causing tests to be skipped or fail to execute.

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.general_idea: Remove JUnit 4 runner class annotation as it is incompatible with JUnit 5.
src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.why_exists: The @RunWith annotation is specific to JUnit 4 and causes compilation or runtime errors when using the JUnit 5 platform.

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.general_idea: Update import statements to use JUnit 5 packages instead of JUnit 4.
src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes are no longer available or recommended in a JUnit 5 environment, leading to compilation errors if not updated.

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.general_idea: Update import for HttpStatus from Apache HttpClient 4.x to Apache HttpClient 5.x (HC5) to align with Spring Boot 3 dependencies.
src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.why_exists: The class org.apache.http.HttpStatus does not exist in Apache HttpClient 5; using the old import causes a compile error.

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 test annotation to JUnit 5 to comply with Spring Boot 3's default testing framework.
src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.why_exists: org.junit.Test is not available in JUnit 5; tests will fail to compile or run if JUnit 4 annotations are used without the vintage engine, which is not the default in SB3.

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.general_idea: Remove JUnit 4 Runner annotation and import as Spring Boot 3 uses JUnit 5 and SpringExtension automatically.
src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.why_exists: org.junit.runner.RunWith and SpringRunner are JUnit 4 artifacts; while not strictly a compile error if the vintage engine is present, they are incompatible with the standard JUnit 5 execution model intended by Spring Boot 3.

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations and runner with JUnit 5 equivalents to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires JUnit 5; JUnit 4 classes like @RunWith, @Before, and org.junit.Test are either removed or deprecated, causing compilation errors or test execution failures.

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents to support the new testing framework.
src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.why_exists: JUnit 4 annotations like @Before and @Test are not recognized by the JUnit 5 engine, causing tests to be skipped or fail to execute.

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 runner with JUnit 5 extension for Mockito integration.
src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.why_exists: The JUnit 4 @RunWith annotation is ignored by the JUnit 5 engine, meaning Mockito mocks would not be initialized, leading to NullPointerExceptions.

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.general_idea: Update import statements to use JUnit 5 and Mockito JUnit 5 integration packages.
src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.why_exists: Classes from org.junit (JUnit 4) and org.mockito.runners (JUnit 4 integration) are either removed or deprecated in favor of JUnit 5 equivalents, causing compilation errors if the old dependencies are removed or incompatible.

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 @RunWith(MockitoJUnitRunner.class) with JUnit 5 @ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class) to support the new test runner.
src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.why_exists: JUnit 4 runner classes are not recognized by the JUnit 5 platform, causing tests to be ignored or fail to execute.

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 @Before annotation with JUnit 5 @BeforeEach for lifecycle methods.
src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.why_exists: JUnit 4 lifecycle annotations are not recognized by the JUnit 5 engine, leading to setup methods not being executed.

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.general_idea: Update imports from JUnit 4 (org.junit.*) to JUnit 5 (org.junit.jupiter.api.*) packages.
src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes are not available in the JUnit 5 API package structure, causing compilation errors if JUnit 4 is removed or not on classpath.

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.general_idea: Update Mockito imports to use JUnit 5 specific extensions and settings.
src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.why_exists: MockitoJUnitRunner is JUnit 4 specific; JUnit 5 requires MockitoExtension.
